summary: PROMPT 5 frontend e2e testing of /(tabs)/my screen — all critical flows verified end-to-end on https://football-chat-api.preview.emergentagent.com against gameon_dev seed. WeeklyStats card, GroupCards (SPORT26 FREE expanded + DIT2026 PRO collapsed), MatchCards with RSVP toggle (POST /api/matches/{id}/rsvp going/not_going, optimistic UI, spinner, green/red revert), match-card tap → /room/{id}, header avatar → SettingsModal (name, masked phone +359***9999, 100% reliability badge, 8 accent colors, BG/EN toggle, terms/privacy, logout), Save profile → PATCH /api/me, Accent color change updates header avatar bg + tab bar instantly, BG/EN language toggle works, Logout → / login redirect, FAB sheet opens 3 options (Нов мач/Нова група/Присъедини се), GroupActionModal join with auto-uppercase entry code. testID props now correctly serialise to data-testid in DOM (fix from iteration 4 confirmed). Zero console errors observed.

issues: Price shows '≈ 0.00 EUR/играч' — likely backend computed price_per_player=0 when no signups; UI rendering is correct but consider hiding price line when 0 or labelling differently. Cosmetic only.

not_tested_or_n_a: TRIAL plan badge with 'Xд' — no TRIAL group seeded (only FREE + PRO).
CANCELLED status pill 'Отменен' — no CANCELLED matches in seed.
Empty state (football icon + 'Все още нямаш група') — super tester is OWNER of 2 groups; would need a fresh phone with no groups.
SeasonBadge — testID 'active-season-badge' returned 0 elements; no active season in seed (expected).
Pull-to-refresh — RefreshControl on web is a no-op; not exercised but no error.
WEEKLY recurrence pill — seeded matches don't appear to be WEEKLY-flagged; 'Идващ #1/#2' shown is the match index, not recurrence.
Create group flow via FAB → POST /api/groups — opened modal but did not submit to avoid polluting gameon_dev seed.
action_items: LOW: Consider hiding 'EUR/играч' line or showing dash when computed price is 0 (DIT2026 match #2 currently shows '≈ 0.00 EUR/играч').
LOW (informational): Empty state, TRIAL badge, CANCELLED match status pill remain unverified — main agent can self-test by seeding a TRIAL group / CANCELLED match if needed.
critical_code_review_comments: testID propagation now correct across all RN-web components — iteration 4 HIGH issue fully resolved.
Optimistic-UI RSVP pattern in MatchCard correctly re-throws error so busy state resets in parent; verified flow round-trips with re-fetched groups updating WeeklyStats counters.
SettingsModal save button calls PATCH /api/me and updates authStore — round-tripped successfully without console error.
Logout uses window.confirm on web (auto-accepted in test) and clears AsyncStorage → redirect to /. Works as designed.
test_credentials: Super test login button (POST /api/auth/super-test-login) → +359888999999 'Super Tester' OWNER of SPORT26 (FREE) and DIT2026 (PRO).
seed_data_creation: None. Only created an RSVP that was immediately cancelled, and a temporary email patch on the super tester profile (test@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: PROMPT 5 my-screen passes 100% of testable assertions. Next iteration should focus on /room/[id] (PROMPT 6) and any TRIAL/CANCELLED edge cases by adding seed for a TRIAL group + a CANCELLED match. Backend on gameon_dev is intact — DO NOT call /api/dev/reset.
